_comment: THE REVENUE LADDER — the money view's source of truth. Each product's STAGE toward its first paying dollar and WHOSE hand the next move needs. The fleet fills in the live/mechanical numbers (PRs shipped, open work) every beat; YOU curate the stage + gate here. Edit freely: this is what the money dashboard, the phone page, and the push notifications all read. Spine: real income before unemployment ends (~late Aug 2026) — enough to rent an EV and live/work/travel.
spine: real income in <10 weeks — rent an EV, live/work/travel
